raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waj teem! kas Netaifni-
bu dohma/ un Launu-
mu paſtrahda us fa-
wahin Ziffahm/ Rihta Gaisina
darra tee to / tapehz ka winno
Rohka to eespehj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee eekahro Tihrumus/
un laupa tohs/ un Naummus/
un atneimm tohs/ ta darra tee
Warras-Darbu pee Wihra un
winna Namma/ un pee ikkatra
eemantojamag Teefas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta sakka tas
KUNGS: Reds/ es dohmaju
Laununu pahr scho Zilti/ no kur-
renes juhs juhfus Raflus ne is-
wilkeet / un ne staigafeet tik
gresni/ jo tas buhs weens nihs
Laiks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai Deena tape weens
fakams Wahrds pahr jums
walkahts/ un weena gauscha
Schehloſchana turreta/ un tape
fazzihts: Mehs effim ar Pohsti-
tchanas pohsiti. Manno Lau-
schu Teefa tohp pahrmihta / ka
winſch man to atrauj ! Kad is-
dallibs winſch mums attat tohs
Tihrumus/ ko winſch irr at-
nehmts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz terw ne buhs neiweens/
kas to Mehrn-Aukli weſt Dattas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne fluddtnajeet (ſakka
uhs teem/ kas fluddina /
teem ue buhs fluddinaht/
Rauna ue irr ja-atgreeſcha
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schi irr ta Wallo-
Jehlaba Namma : Irra-
KUNG A Garb pa-ihſina-
Arrig ſchee irr winna Do
Gan manni Wahrdi darra-
ba tain/ kas peederrigt staig
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ne feun zehlabs ni
Laudis ka Eenaidneeki/
laupat tahs Drehees ar to
тели no teem / kas drohſcht fe
eet no Kerra atnahldami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs tsdsennat tahs
was manno Lauschu no fan
ſtaifteem Nammeen / juhe
jemmat mannu Glihtumu
winnu Behrnixeem muhsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zelleetees / un eita
jam/ jo schi Semme jum
buhs par Duffetchanu/tape
ta irr fagahnita/ tad winna
mattahs ar weenas warr
Maitafchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Buhtu es tahds Wi
kas Webjam un Wiltibai
katdsihtohe/ un mellotu :
fluddinaſchu tew no Wihu
Dsehreena/ tad buhtu es
Pratveets preekſch ſcheem
dim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es tapulzinachn
ak Jehkab wiſsnotak ! es ta
ſchu tohs Atlikkuschns no
ka kohpa/ es liſchu tohs ka
wis ſtitra Ruhti/ ka gann
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
